requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions for Lighting — GSO CISPR 15 vs GB/T 17743
requirement_topic.zh: 照明设备 EMC 发射——GSO CISPR 15 与 GB/T 17743
requirement_topic.zht: 照明設備 EMC 發射——GSO CISPR 15 與 GB/T 17743

summary.en: LED luminaires and lamps for the Qatar market must meet electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) emission limits based on the GSO-adopted CISPR 15 (limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment). This covers conducted and radiated disturbance limits across the relevant frequency range for lighting equipment operating at 240 V, 50 Hz. EMC conformity (test reports against the GSO/CISPR standard) forms part of QGOSM conformity for regulated electrical/electronic products. For any luminaire with radio/wireless functionality, CRA radio approval applies in addition to the lighting EMC requirements (see ledqa-emc-02).
summary.zh: 进入卡塔尔市场的 LED 灯具和灯须满足基于 GSO 采纳的 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值与测量方法）的电磁兼容（EMC）发射限值。该标准涵盖在 240 V、50 Hz 下运行的照明设备在相关频率范围内的传导与辐射骚扰限值。EMC 符合性（依据 GSO/CISPR 标准的检测报告）是受管制电气/电子产品 QGOSM 符合性的一部分。对于任何具备无线电/无线功能的灯具，除照明 EMC 要求外，还须取得 CRA 无线电核准（见 ledqa-emc-02）。
summary.zht: 進入卡塔爾市場的 LED 燈具和燈須滿足基於 GSO 採納的 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值與測量方法）的電磁兼容（EMC）發射限值。該標準涵蓋在 240 V、50 Hz 下運行的照明設備在相關頻率範圍內的傳導與輻射騷擾限值。EMC 符合性（依據 GSO/CISPR 標準的檢測報告）是受管制電氣/電子產品 QGOSM 符合性的一部分。對於任何具備無線電/無線功能的燈具，除照明 EMC 要求外，還須取得 CRA 無線電核准（見 ledqa-emc-02）。

standards_or_laws: GSO CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (GSO adoption of CISPR 15, enforced in Qatar by QGOSM)

summary.en: China's equivalent emission standard is GB/T 17743 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which corresponds to CISPR 15, together with GB 17625 (harmonic current and flicker) for power-quality aspects. For luminaires within the CCC scope, EMC test reports against GB/T 17743 / GB 17625 are part of the CCC certification dossier (CNCA/CQC).
summary.zh: 中国对应发射标准为 GB/T 17743（电气照明和类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），对应 CISPR 15，并配合 GB 17625（谐波电流与闪烁）处理电能质量方面。对于属于 CCC 范围的灯具，依据 GB/T 17743 / GB 17625 的 EMC 检测报告是 CCC 认证材料的一部分（CNCA/CQC）。
summary.zht: 中國對應發射標準為 GB/T 17743（電氣照明和類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），對應 CISPR 15，並配合 GB 17625（諧波電流與閃爍）處理電能質量方面。對於屬於 CCC 範圍的燈具，依據 GB/T 17743 / GB 17625 的 EMC 檢測報告是 CCC 認證材料的一部分（CNCA/CQC）。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17743 — Radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, corresponds to CISPR 15)
GB 17625 series — Harmonic current emission / voltage fluctuation and flicker

gap.en: GB/T 17743 and GSO CISPR 15 both derive from CISPR 15, so the emission limits and test methods are closely aligned. The gaps are administrative: (1) Qatar requires EMC conformity demonstrated against the GSO-adopted CISPR 15 within QGOSM — a Chinese GB/T 17743 report under CCC is not automatically accepted, so a test report aligned to the GSO reference / accepted by QGOSM is required; (2) verify the test was performed at, or is valid for, the Qatar 240 V / 50 Hz supply (50 Hz matches China, so frequency-related behaviour is comparable, but voltage-dependent emissions should be confirmed); (3) immunity may be assessed separately under the GSO-adopted CISPR/IEC 61547 family where applicable — confirm whether QGOSM requires immunity in addition to emissions for the product. Verify the exact GSO/CISPR edition in force.
gap.zh: GB/T 17743 与 GSO CISPR 15 均源于 CISPR 15，故发射限值与测试方法高度一致。差距属行政层面：（1）卡塔尔要求在 QGOSM 框架内依据 GSO 采纳的 CISPR 15 证明 EMC 符合性——CCC 下的中国 GB/T 17743 报告不被自动接受，须提交与 GSO 参照一致/QGOSM 接受的检测报告；（2）须核实测试在卡塔尔 240 V / 50 Hz 供电下进行或对其有效（50 Hz 与中国相同，故与频率相关的行为可比，但与电压相关的发射应予确认）；（3）适用时抗扰度可能依据 GSO 采纳的 CISPR/IEC 61547 系列单独评定——须确认 QGOSM 是否对该产品在发射之外还要求抗扰度。请核实现行 GSO/CISPR 确切版本。
gap.zht: GB/T 17743 與 GSO CISPR 15 均源於 CISPR 15，故發射限值與測試方法高度一致。差距屬行政層面：（1）卡塔爾要求在 QGOSM 框架內依據 GSO 採納的 CISPR 15 證明 EMC 符合性——CCC 下的中國 GB/T 17743 報告不被自動接受，須提交與 GSO 參照一致/QGOSM 接受的檢測報告；（2）須核實測試在卡塔爾 240 V / 50 Hz 供電下進行或對其有效（50 Hz 與中國相同，故與頻率相關的行為可比，但與電壓相關的發射應予確認）；（3）適用時抗擾度可能依據 GSO 採納的 CISPR/IEC 61547 系列單獨評定——須確認 QGOSM 是否對該產品在發射之外還要求抗擾度。請核實現行 GSO/CISPR 確切版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC emission conformity against GSO-adopted CISPR 15 required for regulated lighting products under QGOSM conformity before Qatar market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (in scope) — EMC test reports against GB/T 17743 / GB 17625 form part of the CCC dossier for in-scope luminaires (CNCA/CQC)

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — adopted and enforced in Qatar by QGOSM / MOCI

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED lighting for Qatar must meet EMC emission limits based on the GSO-adopted CISPR 15 within QGOSM conformity, not the Chinese GB/T 17743 / CCC route. Both derive from CISPR 15 and are technically close, but the Chinese report is not automatically accepted — a QGOSM-accepted test report is required. Confirm validity at 240 V (50 Hz unchanged) and check whether immunity (CISPR/IEC 61547 family) is also required for the product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入卡塔尔的 LED 照明须在 QGOSM 符合性框架内满足基于 GSO 采纳的 CISPR 15 的 EMC 发射限值，而非中国 GB/T 17743 / CCC 路径。两者均源于 CISPR 15 且技术接近，但中国报告不被自动接受——须提交 QGOSM 接受的检测报告。须确认在 240 V 下的有效性（50 Hz 不变），并核查该产品是否还须满足抗扰度（CISPR/IEC 61547 系列）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入卡塔爾的 LED 照明須在 QGOSM 符合性框架內滿足基於 GSO 採納的 CISPR 15 的 EMC 發射限值，而非中國 GB/T 17743 / CCC 路徑。兩者均源於 CISPR 15 且技術接近，但中國報告不被自動接受——須提交 QGOSM 接受的檢測報告。須確認在 240 V 下的有效性（50 Hz 不變），並核查該產品是否還須滿足抗擾度（CISPR/IEC 61547 系列）。

requirement_topic.en: CRA Type Approval for Smart / Wireless Luminaires vs SRRC
requirement_topic.zh: 智能/无线灯具的 CRA 型号核准与 SRRC
requirement_topic.zht: 智能/無線燈具的 CRA 型號核准與 SRRC

summary.en: Any LED luminaire with a radio transmitter (e.g. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or other RF control) requires type approval / equipment registration from the CRA (Communications Regulatory Authority) of Qatar before it can be imported, sold, or operated. CRA approval covers the radio module's frequency bands, transmit power, and conformity with CRA technical specifications and the GSO-adopted radio standards. This is in addition to — not a substitute for — the QGOSM lighting safety and EMC conformity. The radio bands and power limits permitted in Qatar must be confirmed against the current CRA specifications, and approval is typically processed in coordination with a licensed in-country importer/representative.
summary.zh: 任何带有无线电发射器的 LED 灯具（如 Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 或其他射频控制）在进口、销售或使用前，须取得卡塔尔通信监管局（CRA）的型号核准/设备注册。CRA 核准涵盖无线电模块的频段、发射功率，以及对 CRA 技术规范和 GSO 采纳无线电标准的符合性。这是在 QGOSM 照明安全与 EMC 符合性之外的额外要求，而非其替代。卡塔尔允许的无线电频段与功率限值须依据现行 CRA 规范予以确认，核准通常与持牌的当地进口商/代表协同办理。
summary.zht: 任何帶有無線電發射器的 LED 燈具（如 Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 或其他射頻控制）在進口、銷售或使用前，須取得卡塔爾通信監管局（CRA）的型號核准/設備注冊。CRA 核准涵蓋無線電模塊的頻段、發射功率，以及對 CRA 技術規範和 GSO 採納無線電標準的符合性。這是在 QGOSM 照明安全與 EMC 符合性之外的額外要求，而非其替代。卡塔爾允許的無線電頻段與功率限值須依據現行 CRA 規範予以確認，核准通常與持牌的當地進口商/代表協同辦理。

standards_or_laws: CRA (Communications Regulatory Authority, Qatar) — type approval / equipment registration for radio and telecommunications equipment
GSO-adopted radio equipment standards (relevant RF conformity references applied by CRA)

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval for the radio module, in addition to CCC certification for product safety. SRRC approval validates the frequency bands and transmit power permitted under Chinese radio regulations. SRRC approval is specific to China and is not recognised by the Qatar CRA.
summary.zh: 在中国，具备无线功能的灯具除产品安全的 CCC 认证外，无线电模块还须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准。SRRC 核准核验中国无线电法规下允许的频段与发射功率。SRRC 核准仅适用于中国，不被卡塔尔 CRA 认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，具備無線功能的燈具除產品安全的 CCC 認證外，無線電模塊還須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准。SRRC 核准核驗中國無線電法規下允許的頻段與發射功率。SRRC 核准僅適用於中國，不被卡塔爾 CRA 認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval — required for radio-enabled equipment in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — product safety for in-scope luminaires

gap.en: China's SRRC approval and Qatar's CRA approval are separate national radio authorisations with no mutual recognition. A smart LED luminaire approved under SRRC for the China market must obtain a fresh CRA type approval for Qatar, with the radio module re-verified against CRA-permitted bands and power limits (which may differ from China's allocation). Practical steps for the exporter: (1) confirm the module's bands/power are permitted under current CRA specifications; (2) submit for CRA type approval (typically via a licensed in-country importer/representative); (3) ensure the QGOSM lighting safety (GSO IEC 60598/62560) and EMC (GSO CISPR 15) conformity are also completed — CRA approval does not cover product electrical safety. Verify current CRA requirements before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国 SRRC 核准与卡塔尔 CRA 核准是相互独立的国家无线电授权，不存在互认。为中国市场取得 SRRC 核准的智能 LED 灯具，须为卡塔尔另行取得 CRA 型号核准，并依据 CRA 允许的频段与功率限值（可能不同于中国的分配）重新核验无线电模块。出口商的实务步骤：（1）确认模块的频段/功率在现行 CRA 规范下被允许；（2）提交 CRA 型号核准（通常经持牌的当地进口商/代表办理）；（3）确保同时完成 QGOSM 照明安全（GSO IEC 60598/62560）与 EMC（GSO CISPR 15）符合性——CRA 核准不涵盖产品电气安全。出货前请核实现行 CRA 要求。
gap.zht: 中國 SRRC 核准與卡塔爾 CRA 核准是相互獨立的國家無線電授權，不存在互認。為中國市場取得 SRRC 核准的智能 LED 燈具，須為卡塔爾另行取得 CRA 型號核准，並依據 CRA 允許的頻段與功率限值（可能不同於中國的分配）重新核驗無線電模塊。出口商的實務步驟：（1）確認模塊的頻段/功率在現行 CRA 規範下被允許；（2）提交 CRA 型號核准（通常經持牌的當地進口商/代表辦理）；（3）確保同時完成 QGOSM 照明安全（GSO IEC 60598/62560）與 EMC（GSO CISPR 15）符合性——CRA 核准不涵蓋產品電氣安全。出貨前請核實現行 CRA 要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (if wireless) — CRA type approval / equipment registration required for radio-enabled luminaires before import, sale, or operation in Qatar; in addition to QGOSM lighting safety and EMC conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (if wireless) — SRRC type approval required for radio-enabled luminaires in China, in addition to CCC product safety

source.publisher: Communications Regulatory Authority (CRA), State of Qatar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart/wireless LED luminaires for Qatar require CRA type approval for the radio module, which is independent of and not recognised against China's SRRC approval. The module must be re-verified against CRA-permitted bands and power limits and submitted (typically via a licensed in-country importer). CRA approval is additional to — not a substitute for — QGOSM lighting safety (GSO IEC 60598/62560) and EMC (GSO CISPR 15) conformity. Verify current CRA specifications before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入卡塔尔的智能/无线 LED 灯具须为无线电模块取得 CRA 型号核准，该核准独立于中国 SRRC 核准且不被互认。模块须依据 CRA 允许的频段与功率限值重新核验并提交（通常经持牌的当地进口商办理）。CRA 核准是 QGOSM 照明安全（GSO IEC 60598/62560）与 EMC（GSO CISPR 15）符合性之外的额外要求，而非其替代。出货前请核实现行 CRA 规范。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入卡塔爾的智能/無線 LED 燈具須為無線電模塊取得 CRA 型號核准，該核准獨立於中國 SRRC 核准且不被互認。模塊須依據 CRA 允許的頻段與功率限值重新核驗並提交（通常經持牌的當地進口商辦理）。CRA 核准是 QGOSM 照明安全（GSO IEC 60598/62560）與 EMC（GSO CISPR 15）符合性之外的額外要求，而非其替代。出貨前請核實現行 CRA 規範。
